message:
feat(ftui): filters UI — time presets, source cycling, input mode dispatch (2noh9.3.3)

TimePreset enum with Shift+F5 cycling (All/Today/Week/Month), SourceFilter
cycling via F11 (All/Local/Remote), InputModeApplied handler for agent CSV,
workspace CSV, and date parsing with validation. FiltersClearAll resets all
state. 11 new tests covering filter cycling, input parsing, and error cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
